hints.description: This company is a utility company focused on delivering natural gas. They operate in several states, primarily serving residential and business customers with reliable energy services. CEO Christopher ***** leads the company, which is notable for its extensive pipeline infrastructure and commitment to safety and sustainability.
hints.funFact1: The company traces its roots back to the early 1900s, initially formed through the consolidation of several smaller gas companies in Kentucky and West Virginia. It has grown significantly through numerous acquisitions over the decades, expanding its footprint across the Southeast and Midwest.
hints.funFact2: In 2019, the company completed a significant merger with *****, creating one of the largest natural gas distributors in the United States. This deal broadened their service area and strengthened their position in the energy sector.
